steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( ! defined( 'WP_PERSONIO_INTEGRATION_VERSION' ) ) { throw new Exception( 'plugin constants missing' ); } if ( ! post_type_exists( WP_PERSONIO_INTEGRATION_MAIN_CPT ) ) { throw new Exception( 'post type not registered' ); } if ( ! taxonomy_exists( 'personioOffice' ) ) { throw new Exception( 'taxonomy missing' ); } file_put_contents( '/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/personio-integration-light/smoke-result.txt', 'SMOKE_OK' );
